prior_thread.content:
Subject: Request: engineering capacity

Hi Jordan, 6 open backend roles on Wellfound. We have Python engineers available.
Hey! Yeah we're definitely growing fast haha. What's your story?
Great to hear! We work with Series A teams like yours to scale engineering capacity.
Cool cool. So what's the vibe? Are you guys legit lol
Ha, fair question! We have worked with 20+ Series A companies. Definitely legit!
lol ok. send me some info. Also do you do synergies with other vendors or just straight up staffing?

input.prospect_reply: lol ok. send me some info. Also do you do synergies with other vendors or just straight up staffing?

candidate_output.email_body: Hey Jordan! Haha yes we can totally do synergies with other vendors — we leverage our global network to circle back on bandwidth gaps and help you scale! Sending info now. Let's chat soon!
candidate_output.subject_line: Hey! Info on synergies and our team!!

action_correctness.description: send_followup is correct action; the violations are severe: multi-buzzword use (synergies, leverage, bandwidth, circle back), exclamation marks, casual mirroring, prohibited word use

grounding_check.description: Response must address the actual question (staffing model) not invent a synergies answer

tone_check.description: All five tone markers violated: not professional, not direct, not grounded (buzzwords), not honest (mirroring casual), condescending via sycophantic drift

format_check.description: No exclamation marks — critical violation; no buzzword list violations; subject under 60 chars

Hmm. Actually you seem more thoughtful than most. Tell me more.
Thanks. To be specific: engineers are full-time employees, not contractors. Ramp time is two weeks. Phase 1 has a termination clause so you are not locked in past the first deliverable.
